overview: 7EVEN is an NFC business card ordering platform. Users sign up, fill out their card details via a form, choose from template designs, and pay to order physical NFC cards. A dashboard shows order history and status.
features: User signup and signin with Internet Identity
Multi-step Google Form-style customer details form
Template gallery with 5+ NFC card design previews
Live card preview updating in real-time
Dashboard showing order history and status
Order detail view with full card preview
